items.title: [正面] Hidden gem of the gacha genre for the goth girls. ...
items.summary:
Hidden gem of the gacha genre for the goth girls. At time of writing it's only really been translated in English (by humans) for a month or two so most the community is Chinese still and there aren't a ton of guides. Very macabre Lovecraftian story that's good enough to make you feel things and honestly S tier music and art overall. Most importantly the gameplay is reminiscent of Slay the Spire and genuinely pretty fun and skillful.

It's generous for a gacha game (the anniversary event gave users 200+ free premium pulls) and my first week or so I must have gotten well over a hundred pulls outside of that. It doesn't feel forced to put in money to enjoy the game, but I would say don't even install the game if you're easily tempted because there's the option for a billion microtransactions if you wanted.
